'''√p-r-r''' ('''kaparar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrat|quadrat]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrat|quadrat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-r-r
|-
! Lemma
| kaparar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiparar || jiparar || shiparar || kiparar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuparar || jujuparar || shushuparar || kukuparar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuparar || juparar || shuparar || kuparar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuparar || juparar || shuparar || kuparar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theparar || jeparar || sheparar || keparar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoparar || jojoparar || shoshoparar || kokoparar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoparar || joparar || shoparar || koparar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoparar || joparar || shoparar || koparar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || parar || parar || parar || parar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || parar || parar || parar || parar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || parar || parar || parar || parar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || parar || parar || parar || parar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæparar || jæparar || shæparar || kæparar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathaparar || jajaparar || shashaparar || kakaparar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thaparar || japarar || shaparar || kaparar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thaparar || japarar || shaparar || kaparar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shaparar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshaparar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishaparar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shapararnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshapararnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishapararnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shapararshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshapararnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishapararshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shapararro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshapararnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishapararro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shapararmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshapararnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishapararmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shapararsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshapararnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishapararsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shapararng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshapararnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishapararng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shapararya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshapararnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishapararya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shapararyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshapararnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishapararyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shapararnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshapararnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishapararnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shapararnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapararnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapararnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shapararnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshapararnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapararnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shapararshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshapararnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishapararshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shapararshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapararnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapararshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shapararshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshapararnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapararshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shapararronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshapararnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishapararronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shapararroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshapararnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishapararroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shapararromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshapararnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishapararromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shapararmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshapararnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishapararmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shapararmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshapararnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishapararmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shapararmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshapararnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishapararmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
